Domenico Tintoretto

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Venus and Mars with Cupid and the Three Graces in a Landscape
by Domenico Tintoretto
Italy · sixteenth century · 1585–1595 · Oil on canvas
←After Jacopo Tintoretto Follower of Domenico Robusti, called Tintoretto→
